name: claude-multi-teams-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the claude-multi-teams plugin — a tmux/cmux-based multi-agent harness for Claude Code, codex, and Antigravity (gemini).

plugins.name: claude-multi-teams
plugins.description: Spawn and drive sibling AI CLI agents (claude / codex / agy) in long-lived tmux or cmux panes via the `cmt` CLI. 13 foundation primitives (spawn / kill / list / ask / send / keys / capture / modal / last-reply / status / wait-status / wait-output / whoami) plus 3 actor-model extensions (enqueue / dequeue / inbox) for deadlock-proof P2P and consensus flows. Real tmux and cmux claude-teams both supported.
